caption: A man with a beard and a shaved head is recording in a studio with a dark, ribbed acoustic wall in the background. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a black logo that reads "Stay Athletic". A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and reacting with a smile, his facial expressions shifting from a smirk to a wide, open-mouthed laugh. He maintains a consistent position, angled slightly toward the microphone, while his eyes look off-camera to the left. His tattooed arm is partially visible on the left side of the frame. The scene remains static in terms of setting and equipment, focusing entirely on the man's animated facial expressions as he talks.
